name: create_pdf
description: Creates a professional PDF document with title, content sections, headers and footers. Returns the file path. You MUST include [FILE:path] in your answer after using this tool.

filename.description: Output filename (without path), e.g. 'relatorio.pdf'. Will be saved in ./output/

title.description: Document title displayed at the top

content.description: Main document content. Use \n for line breaks, ## for section headers, - for bullet points, | for table columns (one row per line, first row = headers)

language.description: Document language for date formatting: 'pt' (default) or 'en'
